title: Strategy: official tools vs Polymath wrappers
task: Decide when Polymath should keep language/connector plugins and when it should defer to official tools.
baseline_prompt: Decide whether Polymath should keep polymath-lang-XX and polymath-connector-XX plugins or defer to official tools.
polymath_prompt: Use the research-scout agent and Polymath decision framing. Decide whether Polymath should keep polymath-lang-XX and polymath-connector-XX plugins or defer to official tools.
